programs.title: Certificate in Sikh Foundations
programs.description: An essential introduction to Sikhi covering theology, history, spirituality, ethics, philosophy, and Gurmukhi script. Designed for learners with no prior background — the gateway to all other programs at Sikh University.

programs.title: Certificate in Gurbani Literacy
programs.description: Master Gurmukhi script, the grammar of Gurbani, and the ability to read Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji. Includes conversational Punjabi, Nitnem, and an introduction to Gurbani exegesis.

programs.title: Certificate in Sikh History
programs.description: A comprehensive survey of Sikh history from the life of Guru Nanak Dev Ji through the formation of the Khalsa and into the modern era. Covers each of the Ten Gurus and major historical events.

programs.title: Associate of Arts in Sikh Studies
programs.description: A broad two-year equivalent covering all 100-level courses across theology, history, ethics, spirituality, language, philosophy, and more. The foundation for all Bachelor's degrees.

programs.title: Bachelor of Arts in Sikh Studies
programs.titleGur: ਸਿੱਖ ਅਧਿਐਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਲਾ ਦੀ ਡਿਗਰੀ
programs.description: A comprehensive four-year equivalent spanning history, theology, ethics, spirituality, philosophy, rehat, sociology, language, and Sikh apologetics. The flagship generalist degree of Sikh University.

programs.title: Bachelor of Arts in Gurmat Philosophy
programs.titleGur: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਦਰਸ਼ਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਲਾ ਦੀ ਡਿਗਰੀ
programs.description: A deep specialization in Sikh theology, philosophy, ethics, spirituality, and rehat. Covers Gurmat metaphysics, the nature of the Divine, comparative religious philosophy, and the practical living of Sikhi.

programs.title: Bachelor of Arts in Sikh History
programs.titleGur: ਸਿੱਖ ਇਤਿਹਾਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਲਾ ਦੀ ਡਿਗਰੀ
programs.description: An intensive study of Sikh history, sociology, political thought, and arts — from the Guru period through the Khalsa Raj, colonial era, Partition, and global diaspora.

programs.title: Bachelor of Arts in Gurbani Studies
programs.titleGur: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਅਧਿਐਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਲਾ ਦੀ ਡਿਗਰੀ
programs.description: A comprehensive study of Sri Guru Granth Sahib Ji and the broader corpus of Sikh scripture. Covers Gurmukhi linguistics, Gurbani exegesis, Sikh literature, theology, musical tradition, and devotional practice.

programs.title: Master of Arts in Sikh Studies
programs.titleGur: ਸਿੱਖ ਅਧਿਐਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਾਸਟਰ ਕਲਾ ਡਿਗਰੀ
programs.description: Graduate-level mastery of Sikh studies across all major disciplines. Requires completion of a Bachelor's degree program. Emphasizes advanced scholarship, textual analysis, and the integration of Sikh knowledge across history, theology, philosophy, and ethics.

programs.title: Master of Divinity in Gurmat
programs.description: The professional degree for scholars, pracharaks, and educators. Combines deep Gurbani study, theology, apologetics, ethics, and rehat — preparing graduates for parchar, community leadership, and academic work.

programs.title: Giani — ਗਿਆਨੀ
programs.description: The highest distinction at Sikh University. Complete all 534 courses across every discipline, then pass a comprehensive 120-question examination with 80%. The Giani is a recognized traditional Sikh scholarly qualification that Sikh University will seek to have co-accredited by Anandpur Institute and Basics of Sikhi.
